title: acmella uliginosa
intro: Acmella uliginosa, also known as sambirano or toothache plant, is a tropical plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The leaves of Acmella uliginosa contain compounds with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The plant's health benefits include relief from toothache pain, reduction of swelling and inflammation, and treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Acmella uliginosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health complaints.
